display.purpose: Landing page hero headlines only. Never used inside the dashboard.

headline.purpose: Page titles, section headings in the dashboard.

title.purpose: Card titles, modal headers, list item primary labels.

body.purpose: Default text — paragraphs, descriptions, table cells, log content.

label.purpose: Form labels, navigation items, badges, small metadata.

mono.purpose: Code blocks, session strings, numeric IDs, technical data display.

shadows.name: floating-panel
shadows.purpose: Dropdowns, popovers, menus. In dark mode, use tonal lift instead.

shadows.name: hover-lift
shadows.purpose: Interactive card hover states. Dark mode uses bg shift instead.

motion.name: ease-out-expo
motion.purpose: Default easing for state transitions and entrances.

motion.name: ease-out-quart
motion.purpose: Slightly more relaxed variant for card entrances.

motion.name: duration-fast
motion.purpose: Hover states, focus rings, small transitions.

motion.name: duration-normal
motion.purpose: Standard transitions — color shifts, opacity changes.

motion.name: duration-slow
motion.purpose: Panel slides, sidebar collapse, accordion open/close.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The single primary call to action on any screen.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 0.375rem; height: 2.25rem; padding: 0.5rem 1rem; border-radius: 0.5rem; border: 1px solid transparent; background: #3b82f6; color: #fff; font-family: Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; white-space: nowrap; transition: opacity 0.15s, transform 0.15s; cursor: pointer; outline: none; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { opacity: 0.8; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(59,130,246,0.5); } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: translateY(1px); } .ds-btn-primary:disabled { opacity: 0.5; pointer-events: none; }

components.name: Outline Button
components.description: Secondary, non-critical action alongside a primary button.
components.css: .ds-btn-outline { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 0.375rem; height: 2.25rem; padding: 0.5rem 1rem; border-radius: 0.5rem; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0; background: transparent; color: #0f172a; font-family: Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; white-space: nowrap; transition: background 0.15s, color 0.15s; cursor: pointer; outline: none; } .ds-btn-outline:hover { background: #f1f5f9; color: #0f172a; } .ds-btn-outline:focus-visible { box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(59,130,246,0.5); } .ds-btn-outline:active { transform: translateY(1px); }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Minimal toolbar or table row action.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 0.375rem; height: 2.25rem; padding: 0.5rem 0.75rem; border-radius: 0.5rem; border: 1px solid transparent; background: transparent; color: #64748b; font-family: Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; white-space: nowrap; transition: background 0.15s; cursor: pointer; outline: none; } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { background: #f1f5f9; color: #0f172a; } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(59,130,246,0.5); }

components.name: Destructive Button
components.css: .ds-btn-destructive { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 0.375rem; height: 2.25rem; padding: 0.5rem 1rem; border-radius: 0.5rem; border: 1px solid transparent; background: rgba(239,68,68,0.1); color: #ef4444; font-family: Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; white-space: nowrap; transition: background 0.15s; cursor: pointer; outline: none; } .ds-btn-destructive:hover { background: rgba(239,68,68,0.2); } .ds-btn-destructive:focus-visible { box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(239,68,68,0.2); }

components.name: Default Card
components.description: Primary content container in the dashboard. Feels printed, not floating.
components.html:
Account Overview
Manage your Telegram accounts
Content area for the card body.
components.css: .ds-card { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 1rem; overflow: hidden; border-radius: 0.75rem; padding: 1rem; background: #ffffff; color: #0f172a; font-family: Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; box-shadow: 0 0 0 1px rgba(15,23,42,0.1); } .ds-card-header { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 0.25rem; } .ds-card-title { font-weight: 600; font-size: 1rem; line-height: 1.4; letter-spacing: -0.01em; } .ds-card-desc { font-size: 0.875rem; color: #64748b; } .ds-card-content { font-size: 0.875rem; line-height: 1.6; } .ds-card-footer { display: flex; align-items: center; padding-top: 0.75rem; border-top: 1px solid #f1f5f9; margin-top: auto; }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: Form input field with clean bordered style.
components.html: We'll never share your email.
components.css: .ds-input { display: block; width: 100%; height: 2.25rem; padding: 0.5rem 0.75rem; border-radius: 0.5rem; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0; background: #ffffff; color: #0f172a; font-family: Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; line-height: 1.25; outline: none; transition: box-shadow 0.15s; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: #64748b; } .ds-input:focus { box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(59,130,246,0.5); } .ds-input:disabled { opacity: 0.5; }

components.name: Status Badge
components.description: Compact status indication — active, idle, error.
components.css: .ds-badge { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; height: 1.25rem; padding: 0 0.5rem; border-radius: 9999px; border: 1px solid transparent; background: #3b82f6; color: #fff; font-family: Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 500; white-space: nowrap; gap: 0.25rem; } .ds-badge-secondary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; height: 1.25rem; padding: 0 0.5rem; border-radius: 9999px; border: 1px solid transparent; background: #f1f5f9; color: #0f172a; font-family: Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 500; white-space: nowrap; } .ds-badge-destructive { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; height: 1.25rem; padding: 0 0.5rem; border-radius: 9999px; border: 1px solid transparent; background: rgba(239,68,68,0.1); color: #ef4444; font-family: Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 500; white-space: nowrap; }

components.name: Nav Item
components.description: Sidebar navigation item with active state indicator.
components.html:
MAIN MENU
DashboardAccountsChats
components.css: .ds-nav-item { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.75rem; padding: 0.625rem 0.75rem; border-radius: 0.75rem; color: #94a3b8; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; text-decoration: none; transition: all 0.15s; } .ds-nav-item:hover { background: rgba(15,23,42,0.5); color: #f1f5f9; } .ds-nav-active { background: rgba(59,130,246,0.1); color: #60a5fa; border-left: 2px solid #3b82f6; padding-left: calc(0.75rem - 2px); border-radius: 0.75rem 0 0 0.75rem; }

narrative.overview: TeleBos is a precision instrument for Telegram power users — a tool that gets out of the way and lets them work. The interface is organized like a well-stocked workbench: every tool is within reach, arranged by task (accounts, broadcast, automation), and built for sustained sessions of high-throughput work. The aesthetic is serious and professional, not decorative. Dark slate surfaces anchor the identity — the sidebar is a deep, confident presence that frames the workspace. The blue accent is used surgically: active states, interactive elements, and data highlights. Cards carry thin ring borders instead of shadows — depth is communicated through tonal layering, not elevation. This system explicitly rejects the AI-tool aesthetic: no cream backgrounds, no gradient text, no glassmorphism, no numbered-section markers.
keyCharacteristics: Dark mode first, light mode as equal-quality accommodation
Flat/tonal layering: depth via color, not shadows
Surgical blue accent, used on ≤15% of any screen
Dense but structured: readable scan paths through complex data
Stateful: every interaction has a clear, immediate response
Reduced-motion friendly: animations serve state transitions, not decoration

rules.name: The One Voice Rule
rules.body: The blue primary is used on ≤15% of any given screen. Its rarity is what gives it meaning. When everything is blue, nothing is active.

rules.name: The No-Tint Rule
rules.body: Neutral surfaces are neutral. No warm-tinted creams, no cool-tinted greys 'for depth.' Chroma in neutrals stays ≤0.005. The accent carries all the color energy.

rules.name: The Single-Family Rule
rules.body: Inter for everything. No second font family, no 'display font' pairing. Hierarchy is expressed through weight, size, and color alone.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are flat at rest. Shadows appear only as a response to state (hover, focus, open). A card at rest should look like it's printed on the page.

dos: Do use Tool Blue sparingly — ≤15% of any given screen. Let slate and white do the heavy lifting.
Do use tonal layering for depth instead of shadows. Flat surfaces communicate 'solid tool' more effectively than lifted cards.
Do use text-wrap: balance on h1–h3 and text-wrap: pretty on long body text.
Do use Inter weight and size as the sole typographic hierarchy. No font swaps, no decorative display type.
Do show clear loading, empty, error, and success states for every async operation.
Do respect prefers-reduced-motion — fade transitions over slide/choreography.
Do keep body text contrast ≥4.5:1 and placeholder text at the same standard.
donts: Don't use cream, sand, beige, or 'warm neutral' backgrounds.
Don't use gradient text (background-clip: text with gradient).
Don't use glassmorphism, backdrop-blur surfaces, or frosted-glass effects.
Don't use tiny uppercase tracked 'eyebrow' labels above section headings.
Don't use numbered section markers (01 / 02 / 03) as decorative scaffolding.
Don't use 'hero-metric' layouts (big number, small label, gradient accent).
Don't use side-stripe borders greater than 1px on cards, list items, or callouts.
Don't use purple, pink, or teal accents.
Don't apply shadows to cards at rest.
Don't invent secondary or tertiary colors the system doesn't have.
Don't use bounce or elastic animations.
Don't reference Telegram's own UI aesthetic.
